# AlignVerticalJustifyCenter

## Tags
center, items, flex, justify, distribute, between

## Categories
layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/align-vertical-justify-center)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AlignVerticalJustifyCenter;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AlignVerticalJustifyCenter { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
